intents.name: service.restart
intents.description: Restart a service in an environment
intents.command: sudo systemctl restart {{service}} && sudo systemctl status {{service}} --no-pager

intents.name: service.status
intents.description: Check the status of a service

intents.name: server.check_disk
intents.description: Check disk usage on a target server or specific path
intents.command: df -h && echo '\nTop directories:\n' && du -sh /var/* 2>/dev/null | sort -rh | head -10
examples: show disk space on api server
how much space on my documents
what is eating space on staging

intents.name: server.check_memory
intents.description: Check memory usage on a target server
intents.command:
free -h && echo '
Top 15 processes by memory:
' && ps aux --sort=-%mem | head -16 | awk '{printf "%-10s %-8s %-6s %-6s %s
", $1, $2, $4"%", $6/1024"MB", $11}'
examples: how much ram is used on staging

intents.name: server.uptime
intents.description: Check server uptime and load
intents.command: uptime && echo '' && nproc && echo '' && cat /proc/loadavg && echo '' && ps aux --sort=-%cpu | head -6
examples: how long has prod been up

intents.name: logs.find
intents.description: Find and list log files on the system, optionally for a specific service
intents.command: echo '=== /var/log ===' && ls -lhS /var/log/*.log /var/log/*/*.log 2>/dev/null | head -20 && echo '' && echo '=== Large logs (>50MB) ===' && find /var/log -type f -size +50M -exec ls -lh {} \; 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '=== Recently modified ===' && find /var/log -type f -mmin -60 -name '*.log' 2>/dev/null | head -10
examples: where are the logs on staging
what logs are on the server
find logs for nginx on prod

intents.name: logs.errors
intents.description: Search for errors across common log files
intents.command: echo '=== Syslog errors ===' && grep -i 'error\|fail\|critical' /var/log/syslog 2>/dev/null | tail -10 || grep -i 'error\|fail\|critical' /var/log/messages 2>/dev/null | tail -10 && echo '' && echo '=== Auth errors ===' && grep -i 'error\|fail' /var/log/auth.log 2>/dev/null | tail -5 || grep -i 'error\|fail' /var/log/secure 2>/dev/null | tail -5 && echo '' && echo '=== Nginx errors ===' && tail -10 /var/log/nginx/error.log 2>/dev/null || echo 'No nginx error log' && echo '' && echo '=== Kernel errors ===' && dmesg --level=err,crit,alert,emerg 2>/dev/null | tail -5
examples: check logs for errors on prod

intents.name: logs.check
intents.description: Check a specific log file — shows recent entries, size, and rotation status
intents.command: echo '=== File info ===' && ls -lh {{path}} && echo '' && echo '=== Last {{lines}} lines ===' && tail -{{lines}} {{path}} && echo '' && echo '=== Rotation ===' && ls -lh {{path}}* 2>/dev/null | head -5
examples: check the nginx error log on staging

intents.name: logs.tail
intents.description: Tail logs for a service
examples: show me the last 100 lines for api logs

intents.name: logs.search
intents.description: Search logs for a pattern
examples: search for errors in api logs
find timeout in nginx logs on prod

intents.name: deploy.run
intents.description: Run a deployment
intents.command: cd /srv/myapp && git fetch origin && git checkout {{branch}} && git pull origin {{branch}} && ./deploy.sh

intents.name: deploy.rollback
intents.description: Rollback a deployment

intents.name: docker.list
intents.description: List running Docker containers

intents.name: docker.restart
intents.description: Restart a Docker container
examples: restart docker container api on prod
bounce the redis container in staging

intents.name: docker.stop
intents.description: Stop a running Docker container

intents.name: docker.start
intents.description: Start a stopped Docker container

intents.name: docker.logs
intents.description: View logs for a Docker container

intents.name: docker.all
intents.description: List all containers including stopped ones

intents.name: docker.images
intents.description: List Docker images

intents.name: docker.cleanup
intents.description: Clean up unused/orphaned Docker resources — stopped containers, dangling images, unused volumes and networks
intents.command: echo '=== Stopped containers ===' && docker ps -a --filter status=exited --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Size}}' && echo '' && echo '=== Dangling images ===' && docker images -f dangling=true --format 'table {{.Repository}}\t{{.Tag}}\t{{.Size}}' && echo '' && echo '=== Disk usage ===' && docker system df && echo '' && echo 'Run "docker system prune -a" to clean up (will ask for confirmation)'

intents.name: docker.prune
intents.description: Remove all stopped containers, unused images, networks, and volumes
intents.command: docker system prune -af --volumes && echo '' && docker system df

intents.name: docker.compose_up
intents.description: Start services with docker compose
examples: docker compose up api on prod

intents.name: docker.compose_down
intents.description: Stop and remove docker compose services

intents.name: docker.compose_build
intents.description: Build or rebuild docker compose services

intents.name: docker.compose_status
intents.description: Show status of docker compose services

intents.name: docker.compose_restart
intents.description: Restart docker compose services

intents.name: cron.list
intents.description: List cron jobs on a server

intents.name: network.ports
intents.description: Show listening ports on a server
examples: what ports are listening on staging

intents.name: network.ping
intents.description: Ping a host or check connectivity

intents.name: files.find
intents.description: Find files or directories by name or pattern

intents.name: files.grep
intents.description: Search file contents for a pattern
examples: grep for error in /var/log on prod
search for timeout in api logs on staging
find text connection refused on prod

intents.name: files.list
intents.description: List files and directories

intents.name: files.tail
intents.description: Tail any file by path
examples: show last 200 lines of /tmp/output.log on staging

intents.name: process.list
intents.description: List running processes, optionally filtered

intents.name: process.kill
intents.description: Kill a process by name or PID

intents.name: ssh.connect
intents.description: Show SSH connection command for an environment

intents.name: user.add
intents.description: Create a new system user

intents.name: user.modify
intents.description: Modify an existing system user
examples: add user deploy to group docker on prod
modify user monitoring add to sudo on staging
usermod deploy add to www-data on prod

intents.name: files.copy
intents.description: Copy a file or directory to a destination
examples: copy the api config to /tmp on staging

intents.name: files.move
intents.description: Move or rename a file or directory
examples: move this config to /backup on staging
rename the old log on prod

intents.name: files.remove
intents.description: Remove a file (not directories)

intents.name: user.list
intents.description: List system users or show user info
synonyms: users history the one we are running as
intents.command: cat /etc/passwd | grep -v nologin | grep -v false | cut -d: -f1,3,6

intents.name: git.status
intents.description: Show git working tree status

intents.name: git.log
intents.description: Show recent git commit history

intents.name: git.diff
intents.description: Show git diff of current changes

intents.name: git.pull
intents.description: Pull latest changes from remote

intents.name: git.push
intents.description: Push commits to remote

intents.name: git.branch
intents.description: List, create, or switch git branches

intents.name: git.checkout
intents.description: Switch to a different branch

intents.name: git.commit
intents.description: Commit staged changes with a message

intents.name: git.add
intents.description: Stage files for commit

intents.name: git.stash
intents.description: Stash or restore uncommitted changes

intents.name: git.reset
intents.description: Reset staged changes or undo last commit

intents.name: file.parse
intents.description: Read and parse a config file (passwd, shadow, .env, yaml, json, nginx, apache)

intents.name: file.read
intents.description: Read a file with smart output — shows sample if file is large

intents.name: file.search_in
intents.description: Search for something specific inside a file and show matches with context
examples: where does it say listen in nginx.conf
show me the part about ssl in the config
find where port is defined in package.json

intents.name: file.search
intents.description: Find where a config or service file is located

intents.name: env.get
intents.description: Read a variable from a .env file
examples: what is the value of REDIS_HOST

intents.name: env.set
intents.description: Save a variable to a .env file with smart naming
examples: save database password for staging to .env

intents.name: archive.tar
intents.description: Create a tar.gz archive from files or directories
examples: tar up the nginx config on prod

intents.name: archive.untar
intents.description: Extract a tar.gz archive

intents.name: archive.zip
intents.description: Create a zip archive from files or directories

intents.name: archive.unzip
intents.description: Extract a zip archive

intents.name: archive.list
intents.description: List contents of a tar.gz or zip archive without extracting
intents.command: if echo '{{source}}' | grep -qE '\.zip$'; then unzip -l {{source}}; else tar -tzvf {{source}}; fi
examples: show archive contents of /backup/app.tar.gz on prod

intents.name: sync.rsync
intents.description: Sync files between locations using rsync

intents.name: sync.rsync_remote
intents.description: Rsync files between two servers or from local to remote
examples: rsync between dev and staging for /srv/app

intents.name: backup.create
intents.description: Create a backup of files, directories, or databases
examples: create backup of /srv/myapp to /backup on staging
back up the database config on prod

intents.name: backup.restore
intents.description: Restore from a backup archive

intents.name: backup.list
intents.description: List available backups
intents.command: ls -lah {{path}}/*.tar.gz {{path}}/*.zip 2>/dev/null | sort -k6,7 || echo 'No backups found in {{path}}'
examples: what backups are in /backup on prod

intents.name: package.install
intents.description: Install a system package
intents.command: if command -v apt-get >/dev/null; then sudo apt-get install -y {{package}}; elif command -v dnf >/dev/null; then sudo dnf install -y {{package}}; elif command -v yum >/dev/null; then sudo yum install -y {{package}}; else echo 'No supported package manager found'; fi

intents.name: package.check
intents.description: Check if a package is installed
intents.command: command -v {{package}} && echo '{{package}} is installed' && {{package}} --version 2>/dev/null || dpkg -l {{package}} 2>/dev/null || rpm -q {{package}} 2>/dev/null || echo '{{package}} is NOT installed'

intents.name: swap.create
intents.description: Create and enable a swap file
intents.command: sudo fallocate -l {{size}} {{path}} && sudo chmod 600 {{path}} && sudo mkswap {{path}} && sudo swapon {{path}} && echo '{{path}} ({{size}}) activated' && free -h

intents.name: swap.delete
intents.description: Disable and remove a swap file
intents.command: sudo swapoff {{path}} && sudo rm -f {{path}} && echo 'Swap removed: {{path}}' && free -h

intents.name: swap.status
intents.description: Show current swap usage

intents.name: network.curl
intents.description: Make an HTTP request to a URL

intents.name: network.whois
intents.description: Look up domain registration and DNS information

intents.name: network.dig
intents.description: DNS lookup for a domain

intents.name: network.traceroute
intents.description: Trace the network route to a host

intents.name: perm.check
intents.description: Check file or directory permissions and access
examples: can I write to /var/log on prod

intents.name: perm.chmod
intents.description: Change file or directory permissions

intents.name: perm.chown
intents.description: Change file or directory ownership
examples: change owner of /srv/app to deploy on staging

intents.name: perm.chown_recursive
intents.description: Recursively change ownership of a directory
intents.command: sudo chown -R {{owner}} {{path}} && echo 'Ownership changed recursively' && ls -la {{path}}
examples: change owner recursively deploy:deploy /srv/app on staging

intents.name: perm.chmod_recursive
intents.description: Recursively change permissions of a directory
intents.command: sudo chmod -R {{mode}} {{path}} && echo 'Permissions changed recursively' && ls -la {{path}}

intents.name: system.history
intents.description: Show shell command history
intents.command: if [ -n '{{query}}' ]; then history 2>/dev/null | grep -i '{{query}}' | tail -{{lines}} || cat ~/.bash_history 2>/dev/null | grep -i '{{query}}' | tail -{{lines}}; else history 2>/dev/null | tail -{{lines}} || cat ~/.bash_history 2>/dev/null | tail -{{lines}}; fi

intents.name: system.hostname
intents.description: Show or set the system hostname
examples: what is the hostname on staging

intents.name: system.datetime
intents.description: Show date, time, and timezone
examples: what time is it on staging

intents.name: system.reboot
intents.description: Reboot the server

intents.name: system.shutdown
intents.description: Shutdown the server

intents.name: system.info
intents.description: Show full system information (kernel, distro, hardware)
intents.command: uname -a && echo '' && cat /etc/os-release 2>/dev/null && echo '' && lscpu | head -15 2>/dev/null

intents.name: systemd.enable
intents.description: Enable a service to start on boot
examples: enable nginx on boot on prod

intents.name: systemd.disable
intents.description: Disable a service from starting on boot
examples: disable nginx on boot on prod

intents.name: systemd.start
intents.description: Start a service

intents.name: systemd.stop
intents.description: Stop a service

intents.name: logs.journal
intents.description: View systemd journal logs
examples: service logs for api on staging

intents.name: logs.dmesg
intents.description: View kernel messages

intents.name: disk.mount
intents.description: Mount a filesystem

intents.name: disk.unmount
intents.description: Unmount a filesystem

intents.name: disk.list
intents.description: List block devices and partitions

intents.name: cron.add
intents.description: Add a cron job
examples: add cron job every hour to run /scripts/backup.sh on prod

intents.name: cron.remove
intents.description: Remove a cron job
intents.command: crontab -l | grep -v '{{pattern}}' | crontab - && echo 'Removed entries matching: {{pattern}}' && crontab -l
examples: remove cron job for backup.sh on prod

intents.name: security.ufw
intents.description: Manage UFW firewall rules
intents.command: sudo ufw {{action}} {{port}} 2>/dev/null && sudo ufw status verbose || echo 'ufw not installed'

intents.name: security.fail2ban
intents.description: Check or manage fail2ban
intents.command: sudo fail2ban-client status 2>/dev/null && echo '' && sudo fail2ban-client status sshd 2>/dev/null || echo 'fail2ban not installed'

intents.name: security.iptables
intents.description: View iptables firewall rules
intents.command: sudo iptables -L -n -v --line-numbers 2>/dev/null || sudo nft list ruleset 2>/dev/null || echo 'No iptables/nftables'

intents.name: security.sshkey
intents.description: Manage SSH keys (generate, list, add authorized)
intents.command: echo 'Authorized keys:' && cat ~/.ssh/authorized_keys 2>/dev/null | wc -l && echo 'keys' && echo '' && ls -la ~/.ssh/ 2>/dev/null

intents.name: cert.check
intents.description: Check an SSL certificate for a domain or file
intents.command: echo | openssl s_client -connect {{target}}:443 -servername {{target}} 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -noout -subject -issuer -dates -fingerprint 2>/dev/null || openssl x509 -in {{target}} -noout -subject -issuer -dates 2>/dev/null || echo 'Could not check certificate'

intents.name: cert.generate
intents.description: Generate a self-signed SSL certificate
intents.command: sudo openssl req -x509 -nodes -days 365 -newkey rsa:2048 -keyout {{path}}/private/{{domain}}.key -out {{path}}/certs/{{domain}}.crt -subj '/CN={{domain}}' && echo 'Certificate generated for {{domain}}'
examples: generate ssl cert for example.com on prod
create self signed cert for mysite.io

intents.name: db.pg_dump
intents.description: Backup a PostgreSQL database
examples: backup database myapp to /backup on staging

intents.name: db.pg_restore
intents.description: Restore a PostgreSQL database from dump
examples: restore postgres mydb from /backup/mydb-dump.sql.gz on staging

intents.name: db.mysql_dump
intents.description: Backup a MySQL/MariaDB database

intents.name: db.redis_cli
intents.description: Run Redis CLI commands

intents.name: network.ip
intents.description: Show network interfaces and IP addresses
examples: what is my ip on prod

intents.name: network.route
intents.description: Show routing table

intents.name: network.connections
intents.description: Show active network connections

intents.name: network.scp
intents.description: Securely copy files between hosts

intents.name: network.bandwidth
intents.description: Check network bandwidth and usage

intents.name: llm.ask
intents.description: Ask an LLM (Claude or ChatGPT) a question
examples: ask claude how to set up nginx reverse proxy

intents.name: llm.claude_cli
intents.description: Run a command through Claude CLI
examples: run claude to review my config

intents.name: llm.convex
intents.description: Run Convex CLI commands
